properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Here's my hand, its yours to hold I give my self to you Here's my heart, please make it yours I give my love to you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We are two becoming one Here I am, here's all of me You have all that once was mine And here's my promise I'm yours to hold I'll stay here by your side

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We are two becoming one We are two becoming one May what he's joined be not undone May our love put Christ on display

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When we're weak and when we're strong When its hard to carry on Oh, God we want your love on display We are two becoming one

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Here's my life, I lay it down I give up myself for you And here's my will I submit to you I Will follow where you lead

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We are two becoming one Sure we are two becoming one May what he's joined be not undone May your love put Christ on display

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: When we're weak and when we're strong When it's hard to carry on Oh God we want your love on display Oh God we want your love in display

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Here we are, we're yours and yours alone God, here we are May what you joined be not undone We want the world to see your love through us. We want more of you

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: We are two becoming one May what he's joined be not undone May our love put Christ on display When we're weak and when we're strong When it's hard to carry on Oh, God we want your love on display Oh, God we want your love on display Oh, God we want your love on display We are two becoming one
